candidate_check.description: Outlook must be configured to not run scripts in forms in which the script and the layout are contained within the message.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Security Form Settings >> Custom Form Security "Allow scripts in one-off Outlook forms" is set to "Disabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 

HKCU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Office\16.0\outlook\security

If the value EnableOneOffFormScripts is REG_DWORD = 0, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Security Form Settings >> Custom Form Security "Allow scripts in one-off Outlook forms" to "Disabled".
title: Outlook must be configured to not run scripts in forms in which the script and the layout are contained within the message.
